name: Monzo API
what_it_does: UK neobank with developer API for read access to personal and business account data — providing transaction history, balance queries, and webhook notifications for account activity, primarily used for personal finance integrations and spending analysis.
use_cases: Reading personal transaction history for personal finance app integrations
Monitoring account balance and incoming payments via webhook notifications
Categorizing spending data from Monzo for budgeting tools
Building Monzo-connected financial dashboards with real-time transaction data
Syncing Monzo transactions to accounting tools or spreadsheets via API
not_for: Making payments or transfers programmatically (Monzo API is primarily read-only for consumer accounts)
Business banking automation at scale (limited API vs. Monzo Business)
Building payment acceptance integrations — Monzo API is for consumers not merchants
best_when: A developer wants to integrate personal Monzo account data into a personal finance tool, budgeting app, or spending analysis service with OAuth2 user consent.
avoid_when: You need to initiate payments, access multiple user accounts without individual consent, or build merchant payment acceptance.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code with PKCE for user-level access. Each user must individually authorize. Access tokens expire in 24 hours. Refresh tokens for long-lived access. Scoped read access — no write permissions on personal accounts. Confidential client required for server-side apps.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; Monzo account required for user authorization
pricing.paid_tiers: No paid API tier; Monzo Plus/Premium for users at £5-£15/month
pricing.notes: API access free. FCA-regulated UK bank. UK and Ireland only. Users must have Monzo accounts. Strong developer community. API primarily for personal use — limited business automation capabilities. Developer-friendly with good documentation.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply per access token; personal use limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covering accounts, balance, transactions, pots, and webhooks. OAuth2 per-user consent required. Webhook for real-time transaction notifications. Read-only for personal accounts. Good developer documentation with playground.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All API calls are read-only — fully idempotent. Webhook registration idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Individual user OAuth2 consent required — cannot access accounts in bulk without each user authorizing
24-hour access token expiry requires refresh token implementation
UK and Ireland only — not available outside these regions
PSD2 strong customer authentication (SCA) re-consent required every 90 days

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. FCA-regulated bank — strong regulatory security. OAuth2 with PKCE. PSD2 compliant. GDPR compliant. SCA re-consent every 90 days. User consent model prevents unauthorized access. Read-only API minimizes risk surface.
